modules.goal: Create the isolated Python 3.12 environment and reproduction command.
verification: Check Python 3.12, pinned versions, imports, and the reproduction command.

acceptance_criteria.description: The case-local Python 3.12 environment imports every required pinned dependency.
One recorded command starts the frozen experiment through that environment.

modules.goal: Materialize and audit the built-in Wisconsin Breast Cancer dataset before modeling.
verification: Compare the snapshot with the loader and check shape, labels, missingness, duplicates, balance, types, and leakage risk.

acceptance_criteria.description: The table and metadata agree with the scikit-learn loader output.
The audit reports every frozen quality check and separates facts from recommendations.

modules.goal: Run the frozen DummyClassifier comparator and scaled LogisticRegression baseline.
verification: Verify the in-pipeline scaler, fixed seeds, stratified holdout, repeated stratified CV, required metrics, and a clean replay.

acceptance_criteria.description: The models, pipeline, split, cross-validation, and no-search boundary match the frozen requirement.
Holdout and fold outputs contain ROC AUC, balanced accuracy, F1, confusion counts, sample counts, and model identities and reproduce under the pinned environment.

modules.goal: Quantify uncertainty and verify that methods and claims are justified.
verification: Recalculate uncertainty, disclose assumptions, avoid unjustified significance tests, then review leakage, bias, overclaiming, generalization, and non-clinical limits.

acceptance_criteria.description: Variability and uncertainty intervals state their method, units, assumptions, and source data.
The review records limitations and permits only conclusions supported by this demonstration design.

modules.goal: Create accessible, source-mapped result figures from saved experiment outputs.
verification: Check source mappings and inspect each full-size PNG for readable labels, accessible colors, defined uncertainty, honest scales, clipping, and overlap.

acceptance_criteria.description: Four PNG figures and matching vector exports map every plotted value to saved evidence.
Full-size inspection finds no unreadable, clipped, overlapping, inaccessible, or misleading elements.

modules.goal: Draft the scientific report strictly from approved evidence and figure mappings.
verification: Map every numerical statement and figure reference to saved evidence and separate results, interpretation, limitations, and non-clinical scope.

acceptance_criteria.description: The draft covers purpose, data, methods, results, limitations, reproducibility, and conclusion.
Every result number and figure reference has a machine-readable source mapping.

modules.goal: Apply the full scientific-writing review without altering scientific content.
verification: Run all five review passes and recheck terminology, sample counts, metrics, intervals, significant figures, and figure references.

acceptance_criteria.description: The review records all five required passes and concrete revisions.
The final report is clearer but preserves the approved data, methods, model identities, and claims.

modules.goal: Create and fully render-check a seven-slide group-meeting PowerPoint deck.
verification: Use the local artifact-tool route, run overflow checks, render every slide, inspect each full size, and reconcile every displayed result with its source.

acceptance_criteria.description: The seven-slide PPTX opens and every slide renders to a nonblank PNG.
No overflow, clipping, overlap, placeholder, narrative break, or chart-data mismatch remains.

modules.goal: Prepare bilingual README case material and reconcile every number and claim across all outputs without editing README files.
verification: Parse metrics, uncertainty, report, PPTX text, figure index, manifest, and summaries; compare sample counts, models, split settings, values, intervals, confusion counts, limitations, and paths under explicit rounding rules.

acceptance_criteria.description: The aligned English and Chinese summaries and visual guidance use only verified artifacts and make no success claim before canonical acceptance.
All numbers, model names, sample counts, settings, limitations, figure labels, and paths reconcile; missing or contradictory evidence fails the check.

work_units.responsibility: Own dataset materialization and the structure, quality, distribution, and leakage-risk audit.
verification: Compare the snapshot with the loader and check shape, labels, missingness, duplicates, balance, types, and leakage risk.

work_units.responsibility: Own the leakage-safe pipeline, frozen models, stratified evaluation, metrics, predictions, and replay.
verification: Verify the in-pipeline scaler, fixed seeds, stratified holdout, repeated stratified CV, required metrics, and a clean replay.

work_units.responsibility: Own uncertainty selection, variability summaries, assumption disclosure, and restrained statistical reporting.
verification: Recalculate uncertainty, disclose assumptions, avoid unjustified significance tests, then review leakage, bias, overclaiming, generalization, and non-clinical limits.

work_units.responsibility: After the statistics owner, verify design validity, bias, leakage, overclaiming, generalization, and non-clinical boundaries.
verification: Recalculate uncertainty, disclose assumptions, avoid unjustified significance tests, then review leakage, bias, overclaiming, generalization, and non-clinical limits.

work_units.responsibility: Own the accessible, publication-quality, source-mapped PNG and SVG figure set.
verification: Check source mappings and inspect each full-size PNG for readable labels, accessible colors, defined uncertainty, honest scales, clipping, and overlap.

work_units.responsibility: Run the five-pass writing review and produce the clear final report without changing scientific content.
verification: Run all five review passes and recheck terminology, sample counts, metrics, intervals, significant figures, and figure references.

work_units.responsibility: Own the artifact-tool PPTX, seven-slide narrative, rendering, overflow checks, visual QA, and source map.
verification: Use the local artifact-tool route, run overflow checks, render every slide, inspect each full size, and reconcile every displayed result with its source.

work_units.responsibility: Create the isolated Python 3.12 environment and reproduction command.
verification: Check Python 3.12, pinned versions, imports, and the reproduction command.

work_units.responsibility: Draft the scientific report strictly from approved evidence and figure mappings.
verification: Map every numerical statement and figure reference to saved evidence and separate results, interpretation, limitations, and non-clinical scope.

work_units.responsibility: Prepare bilingual README case material and reconcile every number and claim across all outputs without editing README files.
verification: Parse metrics, uncertainty, report, PPTX text, figure index, manifest, and summaries; compare sample counts, models, split settings, values, intervals, confusion counts, limitations, and paths under explicit rounding rules.
